content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian walked out of the cultivation tower on the top of Xuanhuang Mountain.

Obviously, Ye Tian passed the assessment and became the master of this cultivation tower.

"Ziya, let's go in!"

Ye Tian said to Ziya.

"Yes, master!"

Ziya happily entered this cultivation tower.

The other highnesses soon left one by one, and Ye Tian officially settled in this cultivation tower on the top of Xuanhuang Mountain.

It didn't take long for the news of Ye Tian's entry into the Xuan-level region to spread, and then the news about Ye Tian's achievements spread, which shocked many His Highnesses.

In the next month, Ye Tian first familiarized himself with the Xuan-level area and learned about the situation in the Xuan-level area, and then began to practice his own cultivation in the Xuan-level area.

The first thing he did was to test his combat power.

When he was at the emperor level, he became the supreme level, but now that he has become the highness of the ninth order of the god level, it is not easy to say what level of combat power he is.

But if Ye Tian wanted to recover to the supreme level, it was not a very difficult thing.

The Yellow region has a corresponding tower, and the Xuan region also has a corresponding tower.

The tower standard in the Xuan-level area is the same as that in the yellow-level area, with floors 1 to 3 representing the Normal-level Highness, floors 4 to 6 representing the Peak-level Highness, and floors 7 to 9 representing the Eternal Highness.

The only difference is that the battle tower in the Xuan-level area has the tenth floor, and if you break through the tenth floor, you can become a Supreme-level Highness.

Ye Tian entered the battle tower of the illusory world and challenged from the first floor.

On the first floor, the challenge is passed in seconds!

The second layer, seconds passed!

Third floor!

Fourth floor!

......

Soon, Ye Tian broke through the seventh layer, which meant that Ye Tian had the combat power of a god-level Constant-level Highness.

Then, Ye Tian broke through the eighth floor of the battle tower again, and still didn't feel any pressure.

When he was on the ninth layer, Ye Tian felt a little pressure, and fought with the clone of His Highness on the ninth layer for a long time before finally winning.

This means that Ye Tian currently has the strength of a first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness, and he is still far from the Supreme Level.

For this strength, Ye Tian was not surprised.

At present, his cultivation is only much higher than that of the Emperor level, and there is no major improvement in other aspects, so it is normal for His Royal Highness to fall from the Supreme level to the first grade.

Coming out of the illusory world, Ye Tian was ready to make a future cultivation plan.

The cultivation of the god level is different from the emperor level, the god level from the first order to the ninth order is the improvement of quantity, for Ye Tian, it is the total amount of immortal power that is increased.

It stands to reason that the ninth order of the god level is already the limit of the god level, and there is no way to increase the total amount, and there is no way to improve the cultivation.

But this is for the general god level, in fact, you can continue to cultivate after the ninth order of the god level, but not to increase the total amount, but to compress the divine power or immortal power.

Of course, this process is also very difficult and long, and at the god-level level, divine power or immortal power can only be compressed to a certain level, and it is difficult to compress it.

However, once compressed, the strength will become correspondingly stronger, which can be regarded as a way to improve the strength.

His Highnesses in the Xuan-level area could purchase the Divine Power Compression Secret Technique, and Ye Tian could cultivate the strongest Divine Power Compression Secret Technique.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian purchased a Divine Power Compression Secret Technique called Gu Sheng Compression Technique, which was created by a powerful person named Gu Sheng, and ranked among the many secret techniques.

This secret art is not about rapid compression, but steady compression, which has a lot of potential and is suitable for those who have time.

Therefore, for Ye Tian, this secret technique is very suitable.

After obtaining the Gu Sheng Compression Technique, Ye Tian began to concentrate on cultivating the Gu Sheng Compression Technique, and with the help of the effect of 300 times time acceleration, the cultivation speed was very fast.

At the same time, Ye Tian also needed to cultivate in two aspects.

One is to create a pinnacle-level sword path mastery, and the other is to create a more powerful divine canon.

Of course, Ye Tian also needed to cultivate many secret techniques such as the Divine Power Defense Secret Technique, replacing the various secret techniques he had cultivated at the emperor level one by one.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, ten years passed.

Ye Tian used his ten years in the Xuan-level region to continuously improve himself in all aspects, his immortal power was reduced by as much as five times, and some secret techniques were all replaced by god-level secret techniques.

The only pity is that he has not yet created the pinnacle-level sword path mastery, but the Divine Secret Technique has created another kind of Divine Secret Technique, which is an offensive type of Divine Secret Technique-

Chaos Palm!

The Chaos Palm borrowed from the Void Mi Palm and many palm techniques, and used the palm technique to release the power of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, the supreme divine codex, to form a unique attack.

In fact, the Divine Secret Art is the use of one's own Dao.

Ye Tian's fundamental path is the Chaos Dao, and the Dao of the Sword is only an auxiliary Dao, so in a certain sense, the Divine Secret Technique is the most important, even more important than the Dao of the Dao.

The power of the Chaos Palm is very terrifying, but the consumption is also very serious, and it is a hole card of Ye Tian.

With the power of the Chaos Palm and five times the immortal power, Ye Tian's strength once again jumped to the level of the invincible level of the Eternal Ancient Highness, but it was still far from the Supreme level.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, he increased his immortal power to a tenfold limit, and then created a peak-level sword path mastery, and then cultivated the Five Elements Great Divine Power and the Five Elements Divine Wheel to the Xiaocheng realm.

The power of the Five Elements Divine Wheel Great Divine Power was very powerful, and it was only at the entry level before, so it was difficult to become Ye Tian's top attack method, but as long as it was promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, its power would be very terrifying.

Although there are many things that need to be cultivated, Ye Tian can at least achieve them, as long as he is given time.

But the other highnesses have no hope of becoming supreme-level highnesses in their lives, even if they are the highness of the god clan Tianxuan and the blood wind of the demon race, they were invincible-level Henggu-level highnesses when they were at the emperor level, and the probability of becoming a supreme-level highness in the future is very high, but if they want to become a supreme-level highness after the god level, they also need to go through a lot of hardships.

And Ye Tian doesn't need it.

He hit the Supreme Highness when he was at the emperor level, and now it is much less difficult to recover to the Supreme Highness, and Ye Tian's future achievements can far surpass the ordinary Supreme Highness, and the future is immeasurable.

this day.

Ye Tian was led by the Dark Lord to the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower.

Now, the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda has been placed in a space in the supreme hall of the human race by the supremes of the human race, and ordinary people cannot enter here.

But the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda was contributed by Ye Tian, so Ye Tian could naturally enter here casually.

When Ye Tian came to the front of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, he saw that the breath of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower was much stronger than before, it can be seen that with the efforts of the Terrans, the origin of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Towers is slowly recovering, and it may not be too long before the Six Paths of Reincarnation Towers can reproduce the power of the Supreme Treasure, and the Terrans will have one more Supreme Treasure.

The Dark Lord was waiting outside, and Ye Tian entered the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower, and immediately came to the inheritance space.

This time, he wanted to inherit the third set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, and if he obtained the third set of movements, Ye Tian could continue to improve the strength of his physical body.

This is a secret technique against the heavens that breaks the restrictions of this universe, but unfortunately only he can cultivate, others may be able to practice the first and second sets of movements under the restrictions of the universe, but after becoming a god, the physical body cannot be improved, and the third set of actions cannot be cultivated.

But Ye Tian is a rebel who has broken the shackles, and now he can naturally continue to break the shackles and improve the strength of his physical body.

Legacy space.

Ye Tian posed for the third set of actions, tried again and again, and persisted for longer and longer.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to gain the recognition of the third statue and obtain the cultivation method of the third set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

Then, Ye Tian left the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower.

After coming back, Ye Tian diligently cultivated the third set of actions of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, and under the persistence again and again, the strength of the physical body became stronger and stronger, and the strength naturally became stronger and stronger.

At this rate of ascension, the day when Ye Tian would become a Supreme Highness would not be far off.

------------

After the supreme hall of the human race had lost too many highnesses after experiencing the prosperity of the ruins world, it recruited the nine-star peerless Tianjiao for cultivation.

Collect Tianjiao from the major star fields, screen them again and again, select the best ones from them, cultivate them into the children of the universe, and send them to the supreme hall of the human race.

And one of them is Zhou Tian!
